title: geum iranicum
intro: Geum iranicum, also known as the Iranian Avens, is a flowering plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and reducing inflammation. The plant's roots and rhizomes contain compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to exhibit antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities, providing various health benefits such as anti-diarrheal, anti-ulcer, and anti-cancer properties. Geum iranicum is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
